amendment_metadata.framework_name: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) Security Rule

framework_info.framework_name: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA)
framework_info.framework_description: The Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) sets the standard for sensitive patient data protection. Companies that deal with protected health information (PHI) must have physical, network, and process security measures in place and follow them to ensure HIPAA compliance.

policies.scope: This policy applies to all organizational units, personnel, systems, and processes involved in personal data protection (amendment) act 2024. The scope covers all personal data, sensitive information, and privacy-related processes throughout the data lifecycle from collection to disposal. It applies to all systems that store, process, or transmit personal information, including backup systems and archived data. The policy encompasses all personnel who handle personal data and all third parties with access to such information.
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for personal data protection (amendment) act 2024, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) establishing clear expectations and requirements for organizational behavior; (2) ensuring consistent implementation of best practices across all applicable areas; (3) minimizing operational risks and compliance gaps; (4) promoting accountability and responsibility among all stakeholders; (5) enabling effective monitoring and continuous improvement; and (6) supporting overall organizational objectives and strategic goals.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Establishes the short title and commencement provisions of the Act.
subpolicies.control: The Act may be cited as the Personal Data Protection (Amendment) Act 2024; commencement provisions are set out in subsection (2).

ai_analysis.extraction_rationale: Extracts the short title and commencement clause which defines the Act's name and effective date.
ai_analysis.source_excerpt: Short title and commencement 1. (1) This Act may be cited as the Personal Data Protection (Amendment) Act 2024. (2) This

policies.scope: This policy applies to all organizational units, personnel, systems, and processes involved in amendment of section 129 of hipaa. The scope encompasses all relevant organizational activities, systems, and personnel as determined by the policy requirements. It includes all operational environments and applies to all stakeholders who may be affected by or responsible for policy implementation.
policies.objective: The primary objective of this policy is to establish clear requirements and guidelines for amendment of section 129 of hipaa, ensuring organizational compliance and operational effectiveness. Specific objectives include: (1) establishing clear expectations and requirements for organizational behavior; (2) ensuring consistent implementation of best practices across all applicable areas; (3) minimizing operational risks and compliance gaps; (4) promoting accountability and responsibility among all stakeholders; (5) enabling effective monitoring and continuous improvement; and (6) supporting overall organizational objectives and strategic goals.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Removes the existing subsection (1) from Section 129.

ai_analysis.extraction_rationale: This subpolicy captures the removal of subsection (1) as required by the amendment.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Replaces wording to allow a data controller to transfer personal data.
subpolicies.control: Substitute 'For the purposes of subsection (1), the Minister may specify' with 'A data controller may transfer any personal data of a data subject to'.

ai_analysis.extraction_rationale: This subpolicy reflects the substitution that expands transfer authority.
ai_analysis.source_excerpt: by substituting for the words ‘For the purposes of subsection (1), the Minister may specify’ the words ‘A data controller may transfer any personal data of a data subject to’.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Removes the limiting phrase from paragraph (a) of subsection (2).
subpolicies.control: Delete the words ', or that serves the same purposes as this Act' from paragraph (a) of subsection (2).

ai_analysis.extraction_rationale: Captures the removal of the limiting phrase to clarify scope.
ai_analysis.source_excerpt: in paragraph (a), by deleting the words ‘, or that serves the same purposes as this Act’.

subpolicies.subpolicy_description: Replaces reference to subsection (1) with appropriate wording.
subpolicies.control: Substitute 'subsection (1)' with the appropriate reference as directed by the amendment.

ai_analysis.extraction_rationale: Reflects the substitution required in subsection (3)(i).
